text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
The "Horsenails ☆ Channel" live stream 
was fire! All the techniques they dropped 
left me gagged♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But the one about how to do gradation got 
me lowkey kinda sad. Their technique with 
the polish was just way too high-level.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
…But what's the use in getting down? 
I've just gotta steal their goated techniques!♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And I'll start by going to a goated nail salon! 
…As soon as I actually find one.
